title: Sign+ [For EBE]
description: Beautified Signs for EBE (Enhanced Block Entities mod)
body:
Beautified Signs for EBE


[More Screenshots](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/sign+/gallery)
## Requirement
[![requires-ebe](https://i.imgur.com/2l34fPd.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/ebe)
## Description **Sign+** is a resource pack that beautifies Minecraft signs by adding borders and hangers. This resource pack is compatible with any resource pack if you have installed [Enhanced Block Entities](https://modrinth.com/mod/ebe) mod. -----
[![support](https://i.imgur.com/ZiY2CXf.png)](https://ko-fi.com/nainonthen00b1)
